name: no.medtekki/witnessed-mcp
description: Issue & verify cryptographically signed, independently witnessed receipts of AI agent actions.

environmentVariables.name: WITNESS_AGENT_KEY_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Path to persist/load the agent signing key (default ~/.witnessed/agent.jwk)

environmentVariables.name: WITNESS_AGENT_JWK
environmentVariables.description: Agent private key as a JWK JSON string (overrides the key file)
